executive_summary: Global systems are under immense strain. Fuel reserves are critically low coupled with energy price surges from the Middle East pointing toward potential conflict and further inflation. Supply chains are at maximum stress and wealth inequality continues to worsen potentially leading to civil unrest.
correlations: Middle East Energy Spike is directly correlated with decreasing Global Fuel Reserves, exacerbating Supply Chain Stress. Taiwan Media Panic showing a mismatch with ground truth potentially masks an impending geopolitical event.
